name: weline/module-media-manager
description: WelineFramework 媒体管理器：图片链接裁剪、缓存及 WLS 兼容的文件浏览/上传/下载

suggest.weline/module-ai: Enables the optional AI media-generation adapter.
suggest.weline/module-storage: Enables optional configured storage sources in the media connector.
suggest.weline/module-theme: Publishes requested development-theme override assets through the Theme integration.
